mechanics.excerpt: The gamemaster calls for an Action Check and uses the following procedure_ Attributes as Target Numbers In some situations the chances of an action' 9 success Or tailure rests mainly on the abilities of another character The most common example of this is in a attack; where the tar- get's agility is the main factor in determining hit Or miss_ In these cases_ the two most relevant Attributes of the tar- get character are added together to produce base TN; which i5 then modified as usual.
